prequential_blocks.description: Prequential evaluation in growing blocks (Preq-Bls). Block 0 is train-only; blocks 1..K-1 are sequential test sets.

rep_holdout.description: Repeated Holdout (Rep-Holdout). Multiple random split points with 60% train context / 10% test window each. Recommended for non-stationary time series (Cerqueira et al. 2020, Tashman 2000).
